description: Demo company records with full business profiles for demo-40-opportunities and matching

profile.name: Al-Riyadh Construction
profile.description: Al-Riyadh Construction is a mid-size contractor based in Riyadh with over two decades of experience in commercial and infrastructure projects across the central region. We deliver construction management, structural packages, and PMO support for building and civil works. Strong track record in high-rise and mixed-use delivery.

caseStudies.title: Riyadh tower
caseStudies.description: Full structural package and construction management for 28-storey commercial tower; delivered on time and within budget.

caseStudies.title: Central ring road civil package
caseStudies.description: Civil works and bridge construction for 15 km ring road segment.

profile.name: Gulf Development Co
profile.description: Gulf Development Co is a Jeddah-based real estate developer focused on residential and mixed-use projects in the Western Province. We develop, procure, and deliver projects through partnerships with contractors and consultants. Active in Vision 2030-aligned residential and hospitality developments.

caseStudies.title: Jeddah waterfront residential
caseStudies.description: 200-unit residential and amenity development; full development and delivery.

caseStudies.title: Corporate campus Phase 1
caseStudies.description: Office and retail mixed-use; led design, tender, and construction phases.

profile.name: Eastern Equipment & Supply
profile.description: Eastern Equipment & Supply provides heavy equipment rental, earthworks machinery, and construction equipment to contractors across the Eastern Province and GCC. We offer excavators, bulldozers, cranes, and related maintenance and logistics support for civil and infrastructure projects.

caseStudies.title: Highway earthworks fleet
caseStudies.description: Provided and maintained excavator and bulldozer fleet for 40 km highway earthworks package.

caseStudies.title: Industrial site preparation
caseStudies.description: Equipment package for large-scale site clearance and grading.

profile.name: Najd Investment Group
profile.description: Najd Investment Group invests in infrastructure and real estate projects across Saudi Arabia and the GCC. We provide equity and debt financing, consortium participation, and strategic advisory for large-scale construction and infrastructure developments aligned with national vision programs.

caseStudies.title: Highway project financing
caseStudies.description: Lead financier and equity partner for major highway PPP; structured debt and equity.

caseStudies.title: Mixed-use development investment
caseStudies.description: Equity investment and board representation for mixed-use development in Riyadh.

profile.name: Saudi Infrastructure Partners
profile.description: Saudi Infrastructure Partners is a large-scale infrastructure lead and consortium partner for highways, utilities, and civil works across Saudi Arabia. We lead or participate in PPP and major government-backed projects, partnering with financial, construction, and equipment providers to deliver complex programs.

caseStudies.title: Highway corridor lead
caseStudies.description: Lead partner for 80 km highway project; formed and managed consortium of financial, construction, and equipment partners.

caseStudies.title: Utilities backbone program
caseStudies.description: Program lead for regional utilities backbone; multi-phase delivery.

profile.name: Red Sea Building Co
profile.description: Red Sea Building Co is a Jeddah-based developer specializing in mixed-use and commercial building projects. We develop, design, and deliver towers and mixed-use schemes, partnering with design leads, MEP contractors, and project managers for full lifecycle delivery.

caseStudies.title: Mixed-use tower Jeddah
caseStudies.description: 30-storey mixed-use tower; led development, design coordination, and consortium of design lead, MEP contractor, and PM.

caseStudies.title: Hospitality and retail complex
caseStudies.description: Mixed hospitality and retail development; full design and construction oversight.
